words.def: the highest point of anything conceived of as growing or developing or unfolding
words.zh: n. 高潮, 極點, 層進法

words.def: an assertion of a right (as to money or property)
words.zh: n. 要求, 要求權, 斷言, 權利

words.def: the bags of letters and packages that are transported by the postal service
words.zh: n. 郵件, 郵政, 郵遞, 盔甲

words.def: a commercially prepared mixture of dry ingredients
words.zh: n. 混合物, 混亂, 糊塗
